bug_data.creator: sclements@mozilla.com
bug_data.description:
For tabs within a splitview, we want to change the default behavior so that the address bar result default opens the URL in the split view but provide a quick action for users to switch to tab (so a reverse of current default behavior, and which flipping the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` pref to true does). 

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

Edit: After a chat with Dale, we're going to utilize the existing quickActions/behavior [gated by the secondaryAction pref](https://searchfox.org/firefox-main/source/browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs#1496) so we can get this into 149 (only for tabs within a splitview) and Dale is going to work in parallel to enable the pref by default which will ideally land in 149 but might have a longer timeline.

comments.raw_text:
For tabs within a splitview, we want to change the default behavior so that the address bar result default opens the URL in the split view but provide a quick action for users to switch to tab (so a reverse of current default behavior, and which flipping the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` pref to true does). 

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

Edit: After a chat with Dale, we're going to utilize the existing quickActions/behavior [gated by the secondaryAction pref](https://searchfox.org/firefox-main/source/browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs#1496) so we can get this into 149 (only for tabs within a splitview) and Dale is going to work in parallel to enable the pref by default which will ideally land in 149 but might have a longer timeline.

For tabs within a splitview, we want to change the default behavior so that the address bar result default opens the URL in the split view but provide a quick action for users to switch to tab (so a reverse of current default behavior, and which flipping the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` pref to true does). 

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

Edit: After a chat with Dale, we're going to utilize the existing quickActions/behavior [gated by the secondaryAction pref](https://searchfox.org/firefox-main/source/browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs#1496) so we can get this into 149 (only for tabs within a splitview) and Dale is going to work in parallel to enable the pref by default which will ideally land in 149 but might have a longer timeline.

Hi Sarah, we're just downgrading this to P2 just because it seems as if no one is currently assigned to it.

Is this something we on the Search are supposed to work on or is someone from your team going to work on it?

comments.creator: jteow@mozilla.com

comments.raw_text:
(In reply to James Teow [:jteow] from comment #1)
> Hi Sarah, we're just downgrading this to P2 just because it seems as if no one is currently assigned to it.
> 
> Is this something we on the Search are supposed to work on or is someone from your team going to work on it?

From my perspective its a P1, though it may not get done in 148. My intention is for someone from my team to pick up as soon as they are able - we are targeting 149 for this - and so that's why I added the [fidife-splitview] tag. (We do not have a general "splitview" component so that's why I filed it here as it seemed the most appropriate place).

Since your teams whiteboard tag was added to bug 1996142, and since Dale said he'd need to do some work to support the functionality for the [secondary action pref](https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1996142#c7) , I had thought the intention was for your team to use that bug for that purpose.

comments.author: atrif@mozilla.com
comments.raw_text:
Verified fixed with Firefox 149.0a1 (2026-01-26) on Windows 11, macOS 14 and Ubuntu 24. The selected tab from the address bar is correctly moved to Split View when selected from Firefox Suggest or the Shortcuts section. Note that I filed bug 2012399 when testing this. 

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!
comments.creator: atrif@mozilla.com
comments.text:

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

comments.author: atrif@mozilla.com
comments.text:
Verified fixed with Firefox 149.0a1 (2026-01-26) on Windows 11, macOS 14 and Ubuntu 24. The selected tab from the address bar is correctly moved to Split View when selected from Firefox Suggest or the Shortcuts section. Note that I filed bug 2012399 when testing this. 

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!
comments.raw_text:
Verified fixed with Firefox 149.0a1 (2026-01-26) on Windows 11, macOS 14 and Ubuntu 24. The selected tab from the address bar is correctly moved to Split View when selected from Firefox Suggest or the Shortcuts section. Note that I filed bug 2012399 when testing this. 

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!

crashes.signature: AsyncShutdownTimeout | IOUtils: waiting for profileBeforeChange IO to complete | JSON store: writing data for 'targeting.snapshot'

bug_analysis.root_cause: Default behavior for address bar results clicking does not open URLs in split view tabs, and the existing 'switch to tab' secondary action pref was not utilized as default for tabs within split view.
symptoms: Address bar results open URLs outside split view instead of within it
Lack of quick action to switch to an existing tab from address bar results in split view
Test failures (xpc) related to quicksuggest and providerOmnibox after initial patch
reproduction_steps: Open Firefox with split view active
Use the address bar to search for a URL that corresponds to an already open tab
Click on the address bar result and observe whether the URL opens in the split view or switches to the existing tab
bug_analysis.technical_details: The patch made the behavior behind the pref `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` the default for tabs within split view, reversing default behavior so address bar results open URLs in split view and provide a quick action to switch to tab. The change involved modifying UrlbarInput.mjs to gate behavior by the secondaryAction pref. Initial patches caused xpc test failures and were reverted. Final approach used an inactionable badge labeled 'Move Tab to Split View' to move tabs instead of switching to them.
bug_analysis.user_impact: Users working with split view have a more intuitive experience where address bar results open URLs within the split view by default, with an easy way to switch to an existing tab, improving workflow efficiency and reducing confusion.

common_patterns: Crashes occurring during memory allocation or garbage collection
Failures related to allocation of new chunks in the GC nursery
Crashes triggered by tab or view management operations (e.g., split view or tab behavior changes)
potential_root_causes: Out Of Memory (OOM) conditions during garbage collection leading to allocation failures
Inefficient or buggy memory management when handling new UI features like split view tabs
Resource exhaustion due to increased memory demands from new tab behaviors
relevant_fix_clues: OOM crash evicting the nursery: "Failed to allocate new chunk during GC" indicates memory pressure or leak
Utilizing behavior behind secondaryAction pref for tabs within splitview suggests new code paths affecting memory
No status or resolution info available for the similar bugs, indicating unresolved memory management issues
similar_bugs_context.summary: These similar bugs suggest that recent UI changes involving split view and tab behaviors introduce additional memory pressure or inefficient memory usage, leading to out-of-memory scenarios during garbage collection. The crashes share a common signature related to failing to allocate chunks in the GC nursery, pointing to a root cause in memory management or allocation strategies under new feature workloads.

The crashes share a common signature related to failing to allocate chunks in the GC nursery, pointing to a root cause in memory management or allocation strategies under new feature workloads.

refined_analysis.root_cause: In browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs, the function handling URL opening from address bar results does not apply the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` preference for split view tabs, causing URLs to open outside split view by default.
symptoms: Clicking address bar results opens URLs outside split view tabs instead of within them.
No quick action to switch to existing tabs from address bar results in split view.
Previous fix attempts caused xpc test failures and were reverted.
reproduction_steps: Enable split view feature in Firefox.
Search for a URL in the address bar that matches an already open tab.
Click the address bar result and observe if it opens inside split view or switches to the existing tab.
refined_analysis.technical_details: The URL opening logic in UrlbarInput.mjs (likely in the `handleOpenURL` function) ignores the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` preference for split view tabs. The fix requires updating this function to apply the preference, making address bar results open URLs within split view tabs by default and displaying an inactionable 'Move Tab to Split View' quick action badge to avoid direct tab switching and reduce test failures.
refined_analysis.user_impact: Improves split view usability by ensuring URLs from address bar results open within split view tabs by default and enabling quick switching to existing tabs, thereby streamlining user workflow and reducing confusion.
refined_analysis.proposed_fix_approach: Modify the `handleOpenURL` function inside UrlbarInput.mjs to respect the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` preference when opening URLs from address bar results in split view. Implement the 'Move Tab to Split View' quick action badge as inactionable, preventing direct tab switching and avoiding regressions.
refined_analysis.optimized_context: In browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs, the URL-opening logic for address bar results does not honor the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` preference in split view tabs, causing URLs to open outside split view by default. Update the `handleOpenURL` function to apply this preference, ensuring address bar results open URLs within split view tabs and display an inactionable 'Move Tab to Split View' badge.
refined_analysis.refinement_critique: The analysis identifies the root cause and key file (UrlbarInput.mjs) but is verbose and mixes feature-level details with unrelated context, reducing focus. It lacks explicit function names or exact code paths where the fix should be applied. Reproduction steps are clear but could be more concise. The proposed fix is described generally without pinpointing the exact function (e.g., handleOpenURL or equivalent) or code flow to update. While the affected files and components are listed, stronger artifact hints with function names or lines are missing. Overall, the analysis is informative but needs tighter scope, more precise artifact references, and a concise summary to maximize AI readiness and PR merge likelihood.

filtered_context.concise_summary: In browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs, the URL-opening logic for address bar results does not honor the browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab preference for split view tabs, causing URLs to open outside split view. Update the handleOpenURL function to apply this preference, ensuring URLs open within split view tabs and show an inactionable 'Move Tab to Split View' quick action badge to prevent direct tab switching and avoid regressions.
core_symptoms: Address bar results open URLs outside split view tabs instead of within them
No quick action to switch to existing tabs from address bar results in split view
technical_constraints: Respect browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab preference in handleOpenURL for split view tabs
Implement 'Move Tab to Split View' quick action badge as inactionable to avoid direct tab switching and test regressions
